Keep this short. The diff says what changed; this says why, and what you did to
believe it works. Delete any section that has nothing real to put in it — an
empty heading is worse than a missing one.
-->

## Why

<!-- The problem, and the reason this is the right shape of fix. Not a file
     inventory — that's what the diff is for. A few sentences or tight bullets. -->

## Decisions worth a second look

<!-- Only non-obvious calls: a trade-off taken, an alternative rejected, a
     shortcut with a reason. Delete this section if the change is boring. -->

## How I verified it

<!-- What you actually ran or clicked, not what you intended to.
     A check you have only ever seen pass is not evidence it works. -->

- [ ] I saw it fail before I saw it pass (bug fixes: reproduced first)
- [ ] Tests: `php artisan test --compact --filter=…`
- [ ] Exercised in the browser
- [ ] Not verified at runtime — and here's why that's acceptable:
